value.found_quote: Once the agent proposes code, instruct it to run the local test command to verify its work. Watch the agent execute the command and iterate on the test outputs automatically.
value.rationale: The page describes a workflow where a verifiable "done" condition (e.g., passing tests via a command like `npm test`) is set, and the agent autonomously loops — executing the verification command and iterating on outputs — until the condition is met. This matches the claim of "goal-directed autonomous iteration." The page does not use those exact words, but the described behavior (agent runs a test command, watches outputs, and iterates automatically) is substantively equivalent. Confidence is medium rather than high because the description is implicit/instructional rather than a direct feature declaration.
